name: memory-engine
description: Captures user prompts and agent responses to Memory Engine for persistent context across sessions

api_key.title: API key (optional)
api_key.description: Optional. Leave blank to use your `me login` session — the plugin falls back to it automatically. Set an API key to attribute captures to a dedicated agent instead: create one with `me apikey create` (or have an admin create one with restricted privileges).

space.title: Space (optional)
space.description: Space slug to capture into (the X-Me-Space). Leave blank to use your active space (`me space use` / ME_SPACE). Pin it for unattended or project-scope installs so captures always land in the same space; if blank and no active space is set, captures are skipped.

tree_prefix.title: Tree prefix
tree_prefix.description: Ltree path prefix where captured prompts/responses are stored (e.g. `claude_code.sessions`).
